_about: Metadata for one life-phase. A new period = a fresh questionnaire run; the old period is archived (status: archived), never overwritten. profile.json/targets.json/prefs.json/feedback.jsonl and plans|shopping/ all belong to THIS period.
label: Fat-loss block

periodPriorities._note: Per-period objective weights set from the questionnaire (cost vs. time). Macro precision + health quality are always-on system defaults and are not listed here.
